name: minimax-vscode
description: Language model provider for GitHub Copilot in VS Code: use MiniMax text models for programming with a Token Plan API key. Does not add speech, video, or image generation APIs.

commands.title: MiniMax: Select API Endpoint (OpenAI / Anthropic SDK)

minimax.apiBaseUrl.markdownDescription: OpenAI-compatible API base URL. Use `https://api.minimax.io/v1` for international users or `https://api.minimaxi.com/v1` for users in China. Must end with `/v1`. Ignored when `minimax.apiFormat` is set to `anthropic-compat`.

enumDescriptions: Anthropic-compatible Messages API at `https://api.minimax.io/anthropic` (recommended by MiniMax docs).
minimax.apiFormat.markdownDescription: API protocol to use. `anthropic-compat` is the recommended path per MiniMax docs and enables the `count_tokens` endpoint and native thinking blocks. `openai-compat` is the legacy default.

minimax.anthropicBaseUrl.markdownDescription: Anthropic-compatible API base URL. Use `https://api.minimax.io/anthropic` for international users or `https://api.minimaxi.com/anthropic` for users in China. Ignored when `minimax.apiFormat` is `openai-compat`.

minimax.commitMessageGeneration.enabled.markdownDescription: Show the MiniMax sparkle on the SCM commit-message input. Disable to remove the inline button without uninstalling the extension.

minimax.visibleModels.markdownDescription: Programming text models (M2 / M2.1 / M2.5 / M2.7) for Token Plan. Order matches [MiniMax M2.7 for AI coding](https://platform.minimax.io/docs/guides/text-ai-coding-tools). Role-play (M2-her) is not included.

minimax.thinkingEnabled.markdownDescription: Enable thinking/reasoning output. Setting this to `false` sends `thinking: {"type": "disabled"}` for M3 (faster, no reasoning tokens). M2.x models always emit thinking regardless of this setting.

apiKey.title: API key
apiKey.description: MiniMax Token Plan API key from platform.minimax.io (Account / Token Plan).

apiFormat.title: API endpoint (SDK)
enumDescriptions: OpenAI SDK — Chat Completions API at api.minimax.io/v1 (legacy default)
Anthropic SDK — Messages API at api.minimax.io/anthropic (recommended by MiniMax)
apiFormat.description: Which protocol/SDK to use for requests. Anthropic is the path recommended by MiniMax docs (native thinking blocks, count_tokens).

thinkingEnabled.title: Thinking (M3)
thinkingEnabled.description: Enable thinking/reasoning output for MiniMax-M3. M2.x models always emit thinking.

scripts.build: npm run bundle && npm run package
